title: Battery Widget Color/Status Sequence
excerpt: What is the logic behind the order of colors shown in the battery widget? I would like it to show the colors in a specific order (with ‘done’/‘in progress’ colors to the left and ‘not started’/‘stuck’ colors to the right…

posts.author: anagalvao (Ana Gubert Galvao)
posts.cookedHtml:
What is the logic behind the order of colors shown in the battery widget? I would like it to show the colors in a specific order (with ‘done’/‘in progress’ colors to the left and ‘not started’/‘stuck’ colors to the right). Because this order will show the battery ‘filling up’ as more things are marked as completed.

However, I am not able to find a place/setting where I can choose the order that colors/statuses will be displayed in.

Any help here is appreciated!

posts.author: WZo (Wolfram)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 for me as well - would love to understand it as well

posts.author: Nairod (Dorian Ortolland)
posts.cookedHtml: Indeed i’m also very much interested to understand how to order the way I wan the battery colours

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Nairod @WZo @anagalvao !

Monday.com partner here! We actually mapped the order! It looks like there is not an actual reasoning behind the order of the colors.

Screen Shot 2022-02-23 at 8.08.34 AM270×722 39.9 KB

Screen Shot 2022-02-23 at 8.09.52 AM2424×970 106 KB

Hopefully this helps!

posts.author: Nairod (Dorian Ortolland)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks from my perspective i figured that the order is based on the % represented by the color. It means that for “visibility” issues they decided to order the colors by descending %. I get it… but it is not what I really want. Indeed i’d like to order the colors in a spécific order (i’m dealing with “statuts”)

posts.author: WZo (Wolfram)
posts.cookedHtml:
appreciate the info with this - similar to others my need is going to

be a certain ranking or listing rather than having it doing the descending order.

Maybe Monday.com is reading up here and can provide the option via settings or so.

Greetings,

Wolfram

posts.author: VincentIBM (Vincent Chenneveau)
posts.cookedHtml: This may have worked in the past but it appears that now any amount of color changing does no reorder the battery widget at all!

posts.author: Drew (Drew Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml: I would also like to arrange status colors in a specific order.

posts.author: SusanImp (Susan Imperato)
posts.cookedHtml: I would also like to be able to specify the order. Thank you!
